title: drop_mk_directive
description: Remove a single `mk set/unset/add/remove VAR` line from overlay.dops (symmetric delete for change_makefile).

kind.description: Which dops line shape to match and remove. 'set'/'unset' match by key alone; 'add'/'remove' match key + token value.

value.description: The token value of the line to remove. Required for add/remove (must match the line's token); ignored for set/unset.

scope.description: Build-line section to search. '@any' (default) targets the universal section. '@current' resolves to the env's current target at apply time. Never type literal '@2026Q2'; the runner injects t.target.
